result.summary: Found several visual/layout problems, mainly caused by horizontal overflow and fixed navigation overlapping content. There is also a content inconsistency in the game count.

issues.description: The page appears wider than the viewport. Content on the right side is clipped, including the top category tab and the rightmost game cards.
issues.suggestion: Constrain the layout to the viewport width, remove unintended horizontal overflow, and make carousels/grids responsive for mobile screen sizes.

issues.description: Game cards are partially cut off on the right edge, making some game artwork and labels unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Use a mobile-appropriate grid, such as two columns, or make the game rows clearly horizontally scrollable with proper spacing and scroll affordance.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game cards, hiding part of the content near the bottom of the screen.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding or safe-area spacing to the main content so cards are not covered by the fixed footer navigation.

issues.description: The 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section shows visible game tiles, but the badge says '0 Games', which is contradictory.
issues.suggestion: Update the game count dynamically so it matches the displayed games, or hide the count if it is not available.

issues.description: The top category navigation shows a partially visible 'Hot Ga...' tab at the right edge, which looks unintentionally cropped.
issues.suggestion: Ensure horizontal category navigation has consistent scroll behavior, spacing, and a visible indication that more tabs are available off-screen.
